Name: ‘Man In White’ coup stopped
Event Description: The coup to overthrow Nidum that was attempted by the Man In White (https://www.notion.so/23dc7339ad0580e18cbceb72ee0a9cd7?pvs=21) was stopped

Name: Keepers officially created
Event Description: The Keepers are created to watch over Nidum, protect its people, and allow its citizens to thrive

Name: Hawksreach Founding
Event Description: The settlement that would become Hawksreach begins as Ultark's mountain village base during his early campaigns.

Name: Establishment of the Varian Dynasty
Event Description: The settlement gains prominence as Ultark establishes the Varian Dynasty, marking it as an important administrative center.

Name: Prospering of Hawksreach
Event Description:
Under King Sebastian's reign, the village transforms into a proper capital city. Major infrastructure projects begin, including:
• Initial mining operations established
• Construction of the First Forge (now preserved as a shrine)
• Development of the first city districts

Name: The Miners' Rebellion
Event Description: A significant uprising occurs when mining guilds protest against harsh working conditions. Sebastian responds by implementing worker protection laws and establishing the Engineers' Exchange to improve mining safety.

Name: Third Shadowspawn War
Event Description: This war was one of the most dangerous, as a new type of creature - charged with necrotic light - took defenders by surprise. The country was saved only by the intervention of giant Corvids, who made an alliance with Queen Isabella

Name: Formal establishment of Royal Corvid Corp
Event Description: Formal establishment of the Royal Corvid Corp in Hawksreach. In the following ~12 years, Development period of the Corp, including establishment of training protocols and breeding programs.

Name: Golden Age of Hawksreach
Event Description: During Magnus's reign, Hawksreach enters its golden age, with significant expansion of the Scholar's Terrace and Merchant's Ring.

Name: Ring finger - Aidan Stonespine - annointed to the hand
Corvid Rookery
Event Description: Completion of the massive Corvid rookery in the Summit District, becoming one of the city's most distinctive features.

Name: Fourth Shadowspawn War
Event Description: Notable for being shorter than previous conflicts, demonstrating Ilkazan's improved military capabilities.

Name: Quinn Thea (https://www.notion.so/1f6c7339ad0580398e39ec529a21355f?pvs=21) annointed to the Hand
Paige Jare (https://www.notion.so/1f6c7339ad0580bcb34efee3d37982df?pvs=21) annointed to the Hand
Rhendron Stonespine (https://www.notion.so/1f6c7339ad058072a277cc48ba734587?pvs=21) annoited to the Hand
Campaign 1 Start (Alexander)
Event Description: The group meet in the Drunken Barnacle
